/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,mavivatan_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/mavivatan_interfaces/mavivatan_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/mavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/mavivatan_interfaces/_mavivatan_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/baris/mavivatan_ws/build/mavivatan_interfaces/rosidl_generator_py/mavivatan_interfaces:/home/baris/mavivatan_ws/build/mavivatan_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib rosidl_generator_py/mavivatan_interfaces/libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
